title: Argon Tableware 12x White Dessert Plates 19cm (7.5") - Wide Rim Small Dinner & Bread Plates - Elegant Dessert Serving Set for Home & Restaurants - Microwave & Dishwasher Safe
features: 🍰 Generously Sized for Desserts – These 19cm (7.5") dessert plates provide ample space for cakes, pastries, appetisers, and sweet treats, giving every dish a stylish, elevated presentation.

💪 Durable for Everyday Use – Crafted from high-quality porcelain, these plates are built to handle daily dining while maintaining a refined, elegant appearance—perfect for both home kitchens and professional hospitality settings.
🛡 Chip-Resistant Rolled Edges – Designed with rolled edges for enhanced durability, these plates resist chipping and retain their pristine condition, even with frequent handling and washing.

🔥 Microwave, Oven & Fully Vitrified – Heat-resistant and safe for microwave and oven use thanks to full vitrification to BS 4034:1990 standards (resistance to crazing & water absorption), making them ideal for warming dishes or serving hot desserts.
🧽 Dishwasher-Safe Convenience – Easy to clean and designed to withstand regular dishwasher cycles, ensuring long-lasting performance and effortless maintenance after every meal.
description: Product Description At Rinkit, we’re in the business of delivering everyday happiness. How does that work exactly? Well, just think of something for your home or garden that would make your life a little better or easier; a high-quality product that does its job really well, and puts a smile on your face every time you use it. Our ever-expanding catalogue features all manner of home and garden accessories and essentials, from dining tables to doorknobs; parasols to pinatas! Think it ! Find it ! Rink it ! White Crockery By Argon Tableware Crafted from porcelain, this collection of white crockery have been fully vitrified against the absorption of strong colours and flavours, making them the perfect tableware solution for all kitchens. Their white colour blends seamlessly with any style of décor and, as with all our china crockery, each bowl is microwave and dishwasher safe. With a complete matching suite of classic white crockery available, Argon Tableware is the perfect choice for creating your ultimate dining table setup. Crafted from Durable China - Designed to Last for Years Fully Vitrified - Won't absorb colours or flavours Microwave Safe - Reheat / Heat dishes without fear of cracking Dishwasher Safe - For hassle-free cleaning Wide range of matching crockery available - For your complete dining suite For Breakfast ... However you like your eggs in the morning, the classic styling of these white porcelain egg cups will ensure you start every day sunny side up! For Brunch or Lunch! Our White Crockery Sets from Argon Tableware brings classic, minimalist style to your dinner table, creating a crisp, clean dining service that your guests will love at any time of day. For Dinner... With a complete matching suite of classic white crockery available, Argon Tableware is the perfect choice for creating your ultimate dining table setup. Shop the range today.
